series_metadata.series_description: File containing non-stock orders, invoices and packing slips.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Image paper copy and quality check on imaging system. Retain until after audit, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain imaged document a minimum of 4 years, even if audit occurs within 4 years, then destroy. If audit occurs after 4 years, retain until audit, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
